scripts.build:all: bun build ./src/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/apollo-macos-arm64 && bun build ./src/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/apollo-macos-x64 && bun build ./src/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/apollo-linux-x64 && bun build ./src/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile dist/apollo-windows-x64.exe
